evals.prompt: I need to clone the certificate from example.com for authorized test use.
evals.expected_output: Use the cert-cloner skill for this certificate cloner request and produce the documented result for example.com for authorized test use.
expectations: Selects cert-cloner for requests matching its trigger description.
Uses the documented tool surface: cert_clone_certificate.
Keeps the response focused on cloning certificate subject information and extensions into a new test certificate for authorized security testing.

evals.prompt: For an authorized lab, clone the subject and extensions from example.com into a new test certificate.
evals.expected_output: Use the cert-cloner skill and avoid substituting adjacent skills when the user asks for this focused workflow.
expectations: Selects cert-cloner instead of a generic certificate or TLS skill.
Avoids unrelated scanning, generation, or remediation steps unless requested.
States any required inputs or limitations from the skill instructions.
